**Evaluating strike announcement**

I need to see if this document is announcing a new or upcoming strike. The title and heading say "SCIOPERO NAZIONALE PERSONALE AUTOFERROTRANVIERI," which hints at a national strike. The content mentions a strike on "28 novembre 2025," indicating it was a past event—a 24-hour strike by autoferrotranvieri personnel. Since this date is in the past, it’s clear the document is not announcing a new or upcoming strike.
